title: Tapping in Depression
subtitle: A five-minute tapping practice for the weight of the depressed day
excerpt: A five-minute tapping practice for the weight of a depressed day. The script does not promise the depression will go. It does meet the body where it is and stop the secondary fight against the depression on top of it.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education. The tapping shape is EFT. EFT was made by Gary Craig in the mid-1990s.

practice.whenToUse: Use on days when the depression is heavy and the fight-against-it is making the day heavier. This is a tool to sit alongside whatever other support you have in place for the depression.

content.text: A five-minute tapping practice for the depressed day. The script does not promise to lift the depression. It does meet the body where it is and stop the fight-against-it from making the day heavier.
New to tapping? Read
how EFT tapping works
first.
The practice
Karate chop (repeat x3)
Even though my body is heavy today and I have nothing in my engine, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I have been fighting this and the fight is making it worse, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I do not have to like this day, I can let it be what it is, and I deeply and completely accept myself.
Tapping round
**Eyebrow:** Today is heavy.
**Side of eye:** The depression is here again.
**Under eye:** I do not have my normal energy.
**Under nose:** The fight-against-it is its own weight.
**Chin:** I am tired of being someone with this.
**Collarbone:** The depression is not my fault.
**Under arm:** It is also not the whole of me.
**Top of head:** I am still in here, under the heavy.
Reframe to positive
**Eyebrow:** I can let today be heavy without making it worse.
**Side of eye:** I have come through these days before.
**Under eye:** I can plan for the energy I have, not the energy I do not.
**Under nose:** I can drop the fight.
**Chin:** I am allowed to be this person and still be loved.
**Collarbone:** I can ask for the help I have.
**Under arm:** One small thing today is enough.
**Top of head:** I can be on my own side today.
Tap the round three times. Then tap the reframe three times.
Where this practice comes from
Original to homemade.education. The tapping shape is EFT. EFT was made by Gary Craig in the mid-1990s.
